channel.title: Infos on IID Group
channel.description: Recent content in Infos on IID Group

item.title: Streaming Submodular Maximization under a k-Set System Constraint.
item.description: The research in Inference, Information and Decision (I.I.D.) Systems Group at the Yale Institute for Network Science is at the intersection of learning theory, optimization, and information processing. We develop data-driven algorithms, with strong theoretical guarantees, that can automatically acquire and reason about highly uncertain information. Our application domains include interactive recommender systems, neuroscience, and optimal robust data gathering.
